rulings.Case Title: PHILLIP COLLINS et al VS. HAYLEE YEE et al
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, July 29, 2015, line 1. PLAINTIFFs PHILLIP COLLINS, GENESIO LOBATO, THOMAS MCVITTY and GARY CHEATLE's AMENDED MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION DENIED. Plaintiffs' Motion filed on April 1, 2015 fails to comply with CRC 3.1350(b) and fails to provide adequate notice of the issue(s) to be adjudicated. Plaintiffs' attempt to cure the non-compliance with CRC 3.1350(b) by filing and electronically serving an Amended Notice 6 weeks later on May 15, 2015, ran afoul of CCP 437c(a). Additionally, Plaintiff failed to shift its burden as no evidence is provided and not facts are cited in the Separate Statement regarding the required element of the cause of action for violation of CC 1942.4 re: "delay [of abatement] is without good cause." CC 1942.4(a)(3). = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: NORMAN BRENT MARSH VS. ELLEN JAMES
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, July 29, 2015, line 4. DEFENDANT ELLEN JAMES' DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT SUSTAINED with 5-day leave to amend for Plaintiff to allege a cause of action for unlawful detainer. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: URAVI, LLC VS. ALSAISI DERHEM THABET ABDULLAH ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Compel Responses To Discovery, To Establish Admissions From Deft And Req. For Monetary Sanctions Against Deft
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, July 29, 2015, line 5. PLAINTIFF URAVI, LLC's Motion To Compel Responses To Discovery, To Establish Admissions From Defendant And Req. For Monetary Sanctions Against Defendant GRANTED, subject to opposition. Defendant to provide responses to Forms Interrogatories, Special Interrogatories and Request for Production within 2 days of notice of entry of order by hand delivery. Admissions are deemed admitted. Sanctions granted in the amount of $860. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: SHAWN YU VS. CINDY YU ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, July 29, 2015, line 6. DEFENDANTs CINDY YU and TOSHIYUKI MUSHA's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Cause of action for unlawful detainer per SFRO 37.9(a)(8) is sufficiently alleged and complaint is not uncertain. The Court notes Defendant's failure to comply with CRC 3.1320(d); filing of supplemental argument 14 days after original motion without leave of Court; and failure to comply with SFLR 2.6B (no courtesy copy reply provided and courtesy copy of the operative complaint lodged July 28, 2015). = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: RENKA PROP. LLC VS. LEONARD JOHNSON JR. ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, July 29, 2015, line 7. DEFENDANTs LEONARD JOHNSON and SHEILA HEMBURY's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Complaint sufficiently alleges a cause of action for unlawful detainer and is not uncertain. Notice is sufficient. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: KDF POST STREET, LP VS. ARLEN FERNANDEZ ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Compel Discovery, Deeming Admitted Truth Of Facts, And Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Defendant
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, July 29, 2015, line 8. PLAINTIFF KDF POST STREET, LP's Motion To Compel Discovery, Deeming Admitted Truth Of Facts, And Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Defendant DENIED. Plaintiff fails to provide any evidence that the only named Defendant in this case, Arlen Fernandez, failed to comply with Discovery requests. Aaron Farmer Declaration at paragraph 10 states that responses from "Defendant GONZALEZ" were not received. = (501/REQ)
